detaileddescription.para: For searching for compartments: seed is the starting compt.

briefdescription.para: Assign scale factor for HH channel conductance.

memberdef.argsstring: (Id id, double Xpower, double Ypower, double Zpower)
memberdef.name: setPowers

detaileddescription.para: Delete messages coming into this particular element if its class that is handled by HSolve
Utility function to delete incoming messages on orig. To be used in zombifying elements.
Returns the set of classes "handled" by HSolve
This function performs a depth-first search (for a compartment) in the tree with its root at 'base'. Returns (Id of) a compartment if found, else a blank Id.
HSolve adapts the integrator HSolveActive into a MOOSE class.
